text:
Rainbow Diamond (レインボーダイヤ, Reinboo Daia) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Rainbow Diamond (レインボーダイヤ): This card allows the caster to summon forth a Rainbow Diamond. This rare diamond reflects light in a multiple rainbow of colors. If you were to propose with this diamond, she is guaranteed to say "yes", regardless of any conditions. Including whether there is any other person!

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.079 :: レインボーダイヤ 
七色に光り輝くダイヤ。このダイヤを渡してプロポーズすれば100％成功する。手元にダイヤがある限り、２人が離れることはないだろう。
|-
![Eng]
|No.079 :: Rainbow Diamond 
Diamond sparkling in seven colors. 100% successful if you propose with this diamond. As longs as the ring is in hand, never will there be a second person.
|}

Trivia

Killua won this card with the aid of a Risky Dice in Dorias.
